_comment: Live-integration app credentials. COPY this file to 'stream-config.json' (same folder) and fill in your own ids. stream-config.json is gitignored and never committed. Alternatively set the env vars TWITCH_CLIENT_ID / YOUTUBE_CLIENT_ID / SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID (env wins over this file). The Twitch app must be a PUBLIC client with Device Code Flow enabled (no client secret). The Spotify app uses Authorization Code + PKCE (no client secret) — register the redirect URI http://127.0.0.1:3030/stream/spotify/callback in the Spotify Developer Dashboard.
